name: Image

api.name: Image
api.description: Image with lazy-loading, loading skeleton, and error fallback.

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: The image URL. When it fails to load, Fallback (or the built-in broken-image placeholder) is shown instead.

parameters.name: Alt
parameters.description: Alt text for the image, also used to build the preview trigger's accessible name.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Width in pixels applied as the width attribute. When both this and Height are unset, the image fills its parent.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Height in pixels applied as the height attribute. When both this and Width are unset, the image fills its parent.

parameters.name: Lazy
parameters.description: Sets loading="lazy" on the so the browser defers loading until the image nears the viewport.

parameters.name: Fallback
parameters.description: URL swapped in when Src fails to load. When null, a muted placeholder with a broken-image icon is shown instead.

parameters.name: Preview
parameters.description: Enables a click-to-zoom overlay: a hover/focus trigger opens the image fullscreen with zoom in/out controls and Escape-to-close.

parameters.name: Zoomable
parameters.description: When true, registers a two-finger pinch-zoom gesture on the image container so touch users can zoom in/out on the image directly (independent of the fullscreen Preview overlay). Sets touch-action: none on the wrapper so the browser doesn't intercept the gesture for native page zoom.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

examples.title: Pinch-to-Zoom
examples.code: <Image Src="photo.jpg" Zoomable="true" Alt="Pinch to zoom on mobile" />

parameters.name: Images
parameters.description: The images to display as a grid of thumbnails, each opening the fullscreen preview overlay on click.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Number of grid columns, from 1 to 6. Any other value falls back to 3.

parameters.name: Gap
parameters.description: Tailwind gap class between thumbnails. Defaults to "gap-2".

parameters.name: GesturesEnabled
parameters.description: When true (default), enables horizontal swipe (prev/next image) and pinch-to-zoom gestures on the fullscreen preview overlay on touch devices.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the thumbnail grid div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the thumbnail grid div.

mdSummary:
# Image

Image with lazy-loading, loading skeleton, and error fallback.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/image

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Image | Src | `string?` | `` | The image URL. When it fails to load, Fallback (or the built-in broken-image placeholder) is shown instead. |
| Image | Alt | `string?` | `` | Alt text for the image, also used to build the preview trigger's accessible name. |
| Image | Width | `string?` | `` | Width in pixels applied as the \<img\> width attribute. When both this and Height are unset, the image fills its parent. |
| Image | Height | `string?` | `` | Height in pixels applied as the \<img\> height attribute. When both this and Width are unset, the image fills its parent. |
| Image | Lazy | `bool` | `false` | Sets loading="lazy" on the \<img\> so the browser defers loading until the image nears the viewport. |
| Image | Fallback | `string?` | `` | URL swapped in when Src fails to load. When null, a muted placeholder with a broken-image icon is shown instead. |
| Image | Preview | `bool` | `false` | Enables a click-to-zoom overlay: a hover/focus trigger opens the image fullscreen with zoom in/out controls and Escape-to-close. |
| Image | Zoomable | `bool` | `false` | When true, registers a two-finger pinch-zoom gesture on the image container so touch users can zoom in/out on the image directly (independent of the fullscreen Preview overlay). Sets touch-action: none on the wrapper so the browser doesn't intercept the gesture for native page zoom. |
| Image | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| Image | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |
| ImageGallery | Images | `List\<ImageItem\>?` | `` | The images to display as a grid of thumbnails, each opening the fullscreen preview overlay on click. |
| ImageGallery | Columns | `int` | `3` | Number of grid columns, from 1 to 6. Any other value falls back to 3. |
| ImageGallery | Gap | `string?` | `` | Tailwind gap class between thumbnails. Defaults to "gap-2". |
| ImageGallery | GesturesEnabled | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), enables horizontal swipe (prev/next image) and pinch-to-zoom gestures on the fullscreen preview overlay on touch devices. |
| ImageGallery | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the thumbnail grid div. |
| ImageGallery | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the thumbnail grid div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `ImageGallery`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Image />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Image/Image.razor`
- `UI/Image/ImageGallery.razor`
